Active Work Architecture
─[ System Rules ]─ ┐

System Rules

Harness-owned rules — overwritten on every /lore-update sync.

To override a system rule, create a file with the same name in the parent directory (.lore/rules/). Operator files take precedence over system files.

PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
